---
title: "Daniel Logan"
---

## Daniel Logan

**Dates:** (b.Londonderry 1854/5)

### Description

bailiff to the Heathcote family in 1891 and 1901

### Biography

In the 1891 census Selina, Lady Heathcote, and her daughters were living at Bartley, Eling, in the New Forest, and Daniel Logan was their bailiff and gardener.  He may have also collected some rents or other fees for them in Hursley and Otterbourne.

### Letters

- Letter from Midsummer Day [21 June 1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
